parameters.subject: =🚀 Auto-Scale Event: Capacity Increased
parameters.text:
=

Auto-Scale Event: Scale Up

Infrastructure has automatically scaled up to handle increased capacity.

Details:

  • Instances Added: {{$json.scaling_decision.new_instances.length}}
  • Additional OCPUs: {{$json.scaling_decision.additional_ocpus}}
  • Cost Impact: +${{$json.scaling_decision.estimated_cost}}/month

Budget Status:

  • Current Monthly Cost: ${{$json.scaling_decision.current_monthly_cost}}
  • Projected Monthly Cost: ${{$json.scaling_decision.projected_monthly_cost}}
  • Budget Limit: ${{$json.scaling_decision.budget_limit}}
  • Remaining Budget: ${{$json.scaling_decision.budget_remaining}}

Timestamp: {{$now.toISO()}}

=📉 *Auto-Scale: Capacity Reduced*

*Action:* Scale Down
*Reason:* Low utilization detected
*Cost Savings:* Resources deallocated

⚡ Infrastructure optimized automatically.

parameters.subject: =📉 Auto-Scale Event: Capacity Reduced
parameters.text:
=

Auto-Scale Event: Scale Down

Infrastructure has automatically scaled down due to low utilization.

Details:

  • Action: Scale Down
  • Reason: {{$json.message}}
  • Cost Impact: Reduced (instances deallocated)

Timestamp: {{$now.toISO()}}
